content:
2 min read
Just now

--

When I started building BondStats, the goal was simple:
Create a place where bond markets become understandable.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Since then, BondStats has grown far beyond a yield tracker.
Today, the platform includes:
🌍 Global sovereign bond market data
📊 Live market dashboards
📚 Hundreds of educational articles
🏛 Central bank and macroeconomic explainers
⚠️ Risk management resources
🇸🇬 Dedicated country learning series
🤖 BondStats AI – an interactive financial assistant designed to explain bonds, inflation, monetary policy, central banks and financial markets in a clear, structured way.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

This is only the beginning.
Many features are still under development, new educational content is published regularly, and the platform continues to evolve every week.
The vision remains the same:
To make global fixed-income markets more accessible, understandable and transparent for everyone.
Thank you to everyone following the journey.
Press enter or click to view image in full size
